subcodes.first_line: Your letter hath reached Our presence, and We have perused its contents, and We shall respond unto thee with that which God shall cast [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر عندنا کتابک و اطلعنا بما فیه و نجیبنک بما یلقی الله
subcodes.subjects: @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayer for healing, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
